title: Document init and clean-code JSON schemas
goal: Document remaining stable JSON schemas for `jcode-harness init --json` and `clean-code check --json`, and add focused e2e coverage for init JSON parseability.
requiredInputs: Need focused init --json e2e parseability coverage
completionConditions: docs/JCODE_HARNESS_JSON_SCHEMAS.md documents `clean-code check --json` shape and guarantees
An e2e test parses and asserts required `init --json` fields without provider/network calls
Status/release docs record the new schema/test coverage
Formatting, focused e2e, harness_cli e2e, cargo check, and selfdev build pass
failureTaxonomy: Init e2e writes outside isolated temp workspace
Network/provider call introduced by schema validation
notes: Continue next implementation slice from SKILLS_HARNESS_STATUS. This is docs/test only, no behavior change intended.
